sections.title: Technique
sections.default: PA and lateral views of the skull were obtained.

sections.title: Findings
sections.normal_text: The bony calvarium is intact with no fracture identified. The sella turcica is of normal size and shape. The facial bones are intact. The paranasal sinuses appear clear. No calcifications are identified within the brain parenchyma. The soft tissues are unremarkable.

sections.title: Impression
sections.normal_text: No fracture or significant radiological abnormality of the skull.

few_shot_normal.input: skull intact, no fracture, sinuses clear

output.findings: The bony calvarium is intact with no fracture identified. The sella turcica is of normal size and shape. The facial bones are intact. The paranasal sinuses appear clear. No abnormal calcifications. The soft tissues are unremarkable.
output.impression: No fracture or significant radiological abnormality of the skull.
